case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL VS WATKINS ANGELA KAYE

docket_entries.description: WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $165.00 AS TO DEFENDANT WATKINS ANGELA KAYE
